headlines.title: Epstein housed victims in London flats after Met chose not to investigate him, BBC reveals
headlines.description: The revelations intensify concerns about repeated police decisions not to investigate 2015 trafficking claims.

headlines.title: Steve Rosenberg: Kremlin's tightening grip on internet fuels Russian discontent
headlines.description: Officials say the restrictions are for public safety, but businesses and the public are feeling the impact.

headlines.title: Stock markets are too high and set to fall, says Bank of England deputy
headlines.description: It is unusual for a senior figure at the Bank to be so forthright on market movements.

headlines.title: Ringo Starr: 'I made all my mistakes on stage'
headlines.description: Beatles star reveals all about his new country album, being a Sir and coming up with the phrase A Hard Day's Night.

headlines.title: Staff at UK's largest Pride event allege bullying and misconduct under sacked CEO
headlines.description: Christopher Joell-Deshields was fired from Pride in London following an investigation into his conduct.

headlines.title: Running marathons for our girls has made us closer, say dads of Southport victims
headlines.description: Sergio Aguiar and David Stancombe run the London Marathon together in memory of Alice and Elsie.

headlines.title: Trump says he speaks 'for the UK more than Prince Harry'
headlines.description: The US president's comments come ahead of a state visit from King Charles III and Queen Camilla.

headlines.title: US soldier charged after winning $400,000 betting on removal of Maduro
headlines.description: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket on the basis of classified information, the justice department says.

headlines.title: First ever talks to ditch fossil fuels as UN deadlock deepens
headlines.description: Some 60 countries are meeting in Colombia as frustration grows with lack of progress in tackling climate change

headlines.title: No rape took place outside Epsom church, say police
headlines.description: The force says the woman concerned had injured her head on a night out and made 'a confused report'.

headlines.title: Couple discovers Lebanon home destroyed by Israel from satellite image
headlines.description: Joe Elias contacted BBC Verify following reports that his village was among several destroyed by Israeli forces.

headlines.title: We paid our builder £44k - then he had us arrested
headlines.description: Victims tell how Steve Figg left their homes – and relationships – on the verge of collapse.

headlines.title: Headscarf with a beret: Muslim designers showcase floral dresses and boxy streetwear in Paris
headlines.description: Some young attendees say the event demonstrated a more inclusive French culture taking shape.

headlines.title: Weekly quiz: What did Madonna lose at Coachella?
headlines.description: How much attention did you pay to what happened in the world over the past seven days?

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Stop sharing data with China' and 'Shoot and kill'
headlines.description: A data breach at Biobank and Trump's new orders to US troops in the Middle East lead Friday's papers.

headlines.title: Relatives of 10 scientists who died or vanished grapple with impact of wild speculation
headlines.description: Conspiracies are running rampant online after the deaths or disappearances of at least 10 people tied to sensitive US research.

headlines.title: Which airlines are cancelling flights to the UK - and what can you do?
headlines.description: Airlines are putting up prices and cancelling flights in response to higher jet fuel prices.

headlines.title: Assisted dying bill to run out of time as Lords hold final debate
headlines.description: The Terminally Ill Adults (End of Life) Bill was supported by MPs but has not cleared its stages in the Lords.

headlines.title: Kenyan leader sparks uproar after  mocking Nigerians' spoken English
headlines.description: William Ruto says Kenyans speak "some of the best English in the world" while it is hard to understand Nigerians.

headlines.title: US rights groups urge caution for World Cup visitors
headlines.description: More than 120 organisations issue a travel advisory for visitors to this summer's World Cup, warning of potential threats to their human rights.

headlines.title: South Korea police arrest man for posting AI photo of runaway wolf
headlines.description: The widely circulated image had prompted authorities to move their search operation.

headlines.title: Masked Iranian forces appear to seize ships in staged video
headlines.description: Analysis indicates that parts of the video appear to have been filmed hours after the ships were reportedly seized.

headlines.title: Woman trapped in sewage pit for three hours after outback toilet collapses
headlines.description: The woman got stuck waist-deep in a pit latrine in the Australian outback after it gave way.

headlines.title: Meta to cut one in 10 jobs after spending billions on AI
headlines.description: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Donald Trump gets on the phone... with Sarah
headlines.description: The president talks to Americast’s Sarah Smith about Starmer, the King and Iran.

headlines.title: The Week: How Much Danger Is Keir Starmer In?
headlines.description: Do Labour MPs feel Starmer can recover from the Mandelson saga?

headlines.title: Who will win title? The big prediction special
headlines.description: Will it be Manchester City or Arsenal for the Premier League title? BBC Sport gets pundits, reporters and fans to predict each of their remaining fixtures - and who will win the league.

headlines.title: Millwall consider legal action over badge on KKK image
headlines.description: Millwall consider taking legal action after Westminster City Council used the club's badge on an illustration of a Ku Klux Klan member.

headlines.title: Raiders take Mendoza with first pick of NFL Draft
headlines.description: Mendoza is just third player in history to be a Heisman Trophy winner, a national champion and the first overall draft pick in the same year.

headlines.title: Korda takes Chevron lead as England's Rhodes impresses
headlines.description: American Nelly Korda takes a two shot lead at the Chevron Championship after the first round, with England's Mimi Rhodes lying fours shots off the top on her tournament debut.

headlines.title: US rights groups urge caution for World Cup visitors
headlines.description: More than 120 organisations issue a travel advisory for visitors to this summer's World Cup, warning of potential threats to their human rights.
